title: Ship (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ship''' refers to several items:

{{Incomplete list}}

==[[Canon]]==
*[[Boat|'''Ship''']], another term for '''boat''', a type of vehicle used for traversing [[Water|aquatic]] environments
*'''[[Starship]]s''', vessels capable of travel in [[realspace]]
*'''[[Shipyard]]s''', facilities that manufactured starships

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
===Technology===
*[[Boat/Legends|'''Ship''']], another term for '''boat''', a type of vehicle used for traversing [[Water/Legends|aquatic]] environments
*[[Starship/Legends|'''Starships''']], vehicles usually used for [[Realspace/Legends|space]] travel

===Vehicles===
*'''[[Needle ship]]'''

===Individuals===
*[[Ship (sentient spacecraft)|'''Ship''']], the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] spacecraft that dwelled in the [[Intergalactic Void]]
*[[Ship (Sith Meditation Sphere)|'''Ship''']], the [[Sith Meditation Sphere]] who participated in the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]

===Locations===
*'''[[Algnadesh Ship Graveyards]]'''
*'''[[Ship graveyard]]'''
*'''[[Ship graveyard (Toshaal)]]'''

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''''[[Ships of Episode I]]''''', an article previewing ships set to appear in [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'' Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]
*'''''[[Ships of the Smuggler's Alliance]]''''', an article on [[Star Wars Gamer 4|''Star Wars Gamer'' 4]] on starships of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]]

==See also==
*[[Supply ship (disambiguation)]]
